Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="screenreader-text" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is not descriptive: 'Info'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="screenreader-text" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is not descriptive: 'Info'

MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (9 avvik)

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Åpningstider</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Info'

<a class="heroMenu__link" href="/aktiviteter/haller-og-utleie"> Info </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skienfritidspark.brp.exigo.no/skienshallen" target="_blank"><strong>Se ledige tider i Skienshallen!</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Buldrerom</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="screenreader-text" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

MINOR

MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skienfritidspark.brp.exigo.no/flerbrukshallen-klatrevegg" target="_blank">Se ledige tider klatrevegg!</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="navMenu__title" tabindex="-1"> <span> Bad </span> <svg class="angle" height="6.741" viewbox="0 0 11.486 6.741" width="11.486" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="navMenu__title" tabindex="-1"> <span> Spa og velvære </span> <svg class="angle" height="6.741" viewbox="0 0 11.486 6.741" width="11.486" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/s
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Info'

<a class="heroMenu__link" href="/arrangementer-og-samlinger"> Info </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skienfritidspark.no/tilrettelegging/aktivitetsparken" target="_blank">universelt utformet</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="screenreader-text" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (57 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="treningssamling_hc-form-arrival_date-field" name="arrival_date" required="" type="date" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="treningssamling_hc-form-departure_date-field" name="departure_date" required="" type="date" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input id="treningssamling_hc-form-customer_organization-field" name="customer_organization" required="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Opening hours</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilSkien fritidspark'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/en"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Skien fritidspark</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilSkien fritidspark'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/en"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Skien fritidspark</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to Activities'

<a href="/aktiviteter" tabindex="-1"> Go to Activities<svg class="angle" height="6.741" viewbox="0 0 11.486 6.741" width="11.486" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M-18714-16061.4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="" tabindex="-1"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilSkien fritidspark'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/en"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Skien fritidspark</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilSkien fritidspark'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/en"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Skien fritidspark</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Search Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Tilrettelagt turløyper i Skien fritidspark | Skien Fritidspark

https://skienfritidspark.no/tilrettelegging/turloyper
Avvik: 96 | Bestått: 201
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (58 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="openingHoursWidget__title">Åpningstider</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Åpningstider</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="screenreader-text" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

MINOR

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til om oss'

<a href="/om-oss" tabindex="-1">Gå til om oss<svg class="angle" height="6.741" viewbox="0 0 11.486 6.741" width="11.486" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M-18714-16061.432l4.328,4.328,4.33
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Info'

<a class="heroMenu__link" href="/aktiviteter/haller-og-utleie"> Info </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://skienfritidspark.brp.exigo.no/flerbrukshallen" target="_blank"><strong>Se ledige tider i flerbrukshallen!</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå tilBad'

<a class="openingHoursWidget__activityLink" href="/aktiviteter/bad"> <div> Gå til <span class="openingHoursWidget__activityLinkTitle">Bad</span> </div> <svg class="arrow" height="4
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="navMenu__title" tabindex="-1"> <span> Bad </span> <svg class="angle" height="6.741" viewbox="0 0 11.486 6.741" width="11.486" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)

Link opens in new window without indication (×3 across article pages)

<a href="/aktiviteter/bad" target="_blank"><strong>badeland </strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label (×3 across article pages)

<input class="search__input" name="q" placeholder="Søk i Skien Fritidspark" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<button class="navMenu__title" tabindex="-1"> <span> Bad </span> <svg class="angle" height="6.741" viewbox="0 0 11.486 6.741" width="11.486" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

https://www.skienfritidspark.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.skienfritidspark.no --max-pages 14 --format html
